title: taraxacum debrayi
intro: Taraxacum debrayi, also known as Debray's dandelion or Taraxacum debrayi, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum debrayi include its high content of flavonoids, which have antioxidant properties, and its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum debrayi include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural diuretic to help with water retention. Taraxacum debrayi can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
